---
title: "w1"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-26"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}

# assign values

a <- 3
print(a)

b <- a*a
print(b)

x <- "hello"
print(x)

```
```{r}

# data types

x <- 5
class(x)

y <- "Hello World!"
class(y)

z <- TRUE
class(z)

```
```{r}

# data structures

# vector

id <- 1:4 # 1 2 3 4
class(id)

score <- c(30, 86, 50, 95)
class(score)

name <- c("Clark", "Lois", "Bruce", "Luthor")
class(name)
```
```{r}

# list

my_list <- list("Hello World!", 1, TRUE, score)
print(my_list)

```
```{r}

# matrix

id <- 1:4
score <- c(30, 86, 50, 95)
id_score <- matrix(c(id, score), nrow = 4)

print(id_score)

```

```{r}

# dataframe

name <- c("Clark", "Lois", "Bruce", "Luthor")
score <- c(30, 86, 50, 95)
df <- data.frame(stu_name = name, 
								 stu_score = score)

print(df)

```

```{r}

# install packages

install.packages("tidyverse")

library(tidyverse)
```
```{r}

# help

help(mean)
?mean

```
